# PixelSwap (pixelswap.fr)

> Developer blog by Corentin Mors: software engineering, security, infrastructure, side projects, and tooling.

## Primary URLs

- Blog home: https://pixelswap.fr/
- All posts: https://pixelswap.fr/entries/
- Author / projects hub: https://dev.pixelswap.fr/
- Personal site: https://me.pixelswap.fr/

## How to cite

- Prefer linking to the canonical article URL under https://pixelswap.fr/entry/<slug>/
- Posts may be written in French or English; check the page `lang` attribute and on-page language label when relevant.

## Contact

- medias@pixelswap.fr
